headline: Rapid 1-hour emergency plumbing, every day of the year
subheadline: Local-trained engineers, upfront fixed pricing, and done-right guarantees.
about_text: Sunrise Plumbing supports London homes and small businesses with responsive, quality plumbing solutions—every call backed by clear estimates and care.

services.title: 24/7 Leak Repair
services.description: Immediate response, permanent fix, and added leak-proof inspection.

services.title: Boiler Refitting
services.description: Energy-efficient boiler upgrades with safety certification and warranties.

services.title: Bathroom Renovations
services.description: End-to-end project execution with premium fixtures and strict cleanliness.

reviews.name: Mark R.
reviews.quote: First-class service from first contact to completion; I couldn't believe how fast they turned up.

reviews.name: Petra Holdings
reviews.quote: Reliable team and excellent communication. Every property manager should use them.

faqs.question: Can I get a same-day visit?
faqs.answer: Yes—if you book before 2pm our local team can usually be on site the same day.

faqs.question: Do you offer written guarantees?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide up to 10-year guarantees on installation and a 2-year workmanship warranty.

service_area_text: Serving all London boroughs: Central, North, South, East, West, and surrounding business parks.
differentiators: Fixed-price emergency calls with no hidden fees
Certified engineers on call 24/7, 365 days a year
trust_proof: Rated 4.9 stars on independent review platforms

metadata.title: Sunrise Plumbing | London Emergency Plumbers
metadata.description: Reliable emergency plumbing in London. 4.9 star service with a 10-year guarantee.
